utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hi ! I am Dr . Drake Remoray and I have a few routine questions I need to ask you .

utterances.speaker: Man
utterances.text: Really ? I have been dealing with Dr . Wells .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am Dr . Drake Remoray and I have a few routine questions I need to ask you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I know , but I am a neurologist .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And just to be on the safe side , Dr . Wells wanted a more comprehensive overview of you status so he sent me .

utterances.speaker: Man
utterances.text: Dr . Wells is a woman .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That was a test . Good response . All right , full name .

utterances.speaker: Man
utterances.text: Clifford Burnett .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Date of birth ?

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: November 16th , 1968

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Age ?

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: Can not you figure that out based on my date of birth ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_Can not you figure that out based on my date of birth ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am a doctor Cliff , not a mathematician .

emotion_cause.span: 11_Can not you figure that out based on my date of birth ?

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: I am 33 .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay . And uh , are you married .

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: No .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh really ? So , 33 and still single , would you say you have commitment issues ?

emotion_cause.span: 16_33 and still single , would you say you have commitment issues ?

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: Are all the questions this personal ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yes .

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: Well uh if you must know I am a widower .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh that is terrible . I am ... I am really sorry .

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: Yeah .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hmm . Do you sleep with women and never call them again ?

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: No .
